Like we have, you know,
a complete idea of the, the,
the state of the world. So,
which is totally in our
memory, we don't current
currently perceive it. So we
might want to combine the,
what we perceive about the
world with the content of a
memory feed this to our world
model. And a world model it's
going to give, it is going to
take an imagined sequence of
actions that we imagine taking
and is going to predict the
resulting state of the world
or sequence of states that the
world is going to go through
as a consequence of the
actions that we imagine
taking.
